symptom_description: Severe grinding audible near drive coupling. Motor bearing temperature elevated (`102`°C) with `extreme` radial vibration (`0.53` in/sec RMS).
root_cause: Normal fatigue wear of deep groove ball bearings (`0.021 inch` race play) after exceeding `13354` hours of continuous operating life.
action_taken: Disassembled motor, installed insulated NDE bearing and standard DE bearing (`Spec-212`), verified proper clearance (`0.009 gap`), and tested smooth running (`0.44` in/sec).
parts_used: SKF Deep Groove Ball Bearing Set, Grease Valve Kit, End Shield Gasket

symptom_description: Motor drive-end bearing housing temperature reaching `109`°C (`alarm > 85°C`). High frequency acoustic vibration (`0.48` in/sec RMS) detected.
root_cause: Contamination of bearing grease with ambient chemical dust (`413 ppm` solids) through defective shaft labyrinth seal (`0.018 gap`).
action_taken: Replaced DE/NDE bearings (`P/N 7732-X`), installed upgraded non-contact INPRO labyrinth shaft seals (`Spec-238`), and greased with Polyrex EM (`59%` fill).
parts_used: Precision Ball Bearing C3 Set, INPRO Labyrinth Seal Kit, Polyrex EM Grease

symptom_description: Thermal overload relay tripped after `34668` hours of continuous running (`37 Amps`). Cooling fan shroud feels slight hot to the touch.
root_cause: Running motor at low RPM (`< 44 Hz`) via VFD without auxiliary blower forced-air cooling, leading to severe thermal stagnation (`147`°C).
action_taken: Corrected upstream tap settings on transformer to balance phase voltage (`4160V`), deep cleaned motor heat sink fins, and verified winding temp dropped (`-94`°C).
parts_used: Cooling Fan Blade Assembly, Shroud Fasteners, Fan Guard Grid

symptom_description: Motor tripped main overload and instantaneous ground fault protection (`133 Amps`). Stator shows `99`°C localized hotspot on IR scan.
root_cause: Overloading motor beyond `1.15` service factor (`drawing 70%` above rated `113 Amps`) during peak production caused sustained copper heating (`137`°C).
action_taken: Performed complete motor replacement (`Spec-755`), renewed lead lugs (`225 in-lbs` torque), and verified dynamic balance (`0.40` in/sec) and laser alignment (`0.011 gap`).
parts_used: Warehouse Spare Induction Motor Assembly, Mounting Bolt Set, Lead Connectors

symptom_description: Radial vibration velocity (`0.40` in/sec RMS) peaking at `1X` running speed (`19 Hz`). Phase angle steady across drive-end bearing pedestal.
root_cause: Porosity and casting voids (`0.05 inch` void) inside aluminum rotor short-circuit rings that shifted after `20872` thermal cycles (`96`°C).
action_taken: Extracted rotor, machined end rings to true balance plane (`0.006 tolerance`), balanced dynamically (`G1.0`), and verified smooth running (`0.47` in/sec RMS).
parts_used: Precision Dynamic Balancing Weight Set, End Ring Clip Kit

symptom_description: Motor drive-end bearing housing temperature reaching `104`°C (`alarm > 85°C`). High frequency acoustic vibration (`0.55` in/sec RMS) detected.
root_cause: Shaft voltage discharge (EDM currents of `460V +/- 4%`) from VFD switching transients caused fluting and micro-pitting on bearing raceways.
action_taken: Replaced worn bearing set (`P/N 2268-X`), cleaned grease cavities of `36 ppm` debris, installed new grease relief valves, and balanced rotor assembly (`G2.5`).
parts_used: Bearing Kit (DE & NDE), Lip Seals, Bearing Housing Gasket

symptom_description: Motor casing temperature elevated (`+93`°C above ambient). Winding resistance increased due to excessive copper temperature (`138`°C). Field diagnostics indicate misalignment at shaft coupling connecting directly to CNV-601.
root_cause: Broken external cooling fan blade (`28%` fan area lost) caused loss of turbulent airflow across cooling ribs under `135 Amps` load.
action_taken: Replaced damaged polypropylene cooling fan (`Spec-998`), straightened bent fan cowl (`0.010 gap`), and verified full airflow restoration (`116`°C housing).
parts_used: Polypropylene Replacement Cooling Fan, Cowl Hardware Kit

symptom_description: Motor shaking severely (`0.32` in/sec RMS) right after routine cleaning. No electrical anomalies detected on phase currents (`169 Amps`).
root_cause: Uneven accumulation of heavy dried process cake and dirt (`0.12 inch` layer) inside rotor cooling channels and external fan blades.
action_taken: Removed rotor from stator, cleaned debris from cooling slots, checked shaft runout on lathe (`0.012 inch`), and dynamically balanced rotor to G2.5 grade (`0.23` in/sec).
parts_used: Replacement Cooling Fan Assembly, Shaft Key, Balancing Weights

symptom_description: High horizontal vibration measured at motor drive-end (`0.29` in/sec RMS, `46%` above ISO 10816 alarm threshold). Unit humming loudly (`growling`).
root_cause: Thermal bowing (`0.006 inch` deflection) of rotor shaft caused by previous localized stator winding hotspot (`114`°C) during high load run.
action_taken: Replaced cracked external cooling fan (`Spec-713`), cleaned rotor end rings, and applied trim balance weights (`Spec-239`) to drive-end balance plane.
parts_used: Rotor Balancing Clip Set, External Cooling Fan

symptom_description: Motor frame temperature exceeding `75`°C measured across cooling fins. RTD sensors indicating winding temp near `106`°C (`alarm limit 140°C`).
root_cause: Broken external cooling fan blade (`27%` fan area lost) caused loss of turbulent airflow across cooling ribs under `72 Amps` load.
action_taken: Replaced damaged polypropylene cooling fan (`P/N 2852-B`), straightened bent fan cowl (`0.011 gap`), and verified full airflow restoration (`103`°C housing).
parts_used: Polypropylene Replacement Cooling Fan, Cowl Hardware Kit

symptom_description: Strong unusual smell of burnt varnish from motor cooling fan shroud. Megger test reads `0.24 Mega-ohms` between Phase A and ground (`460V +/- 2%`).
root_cause: Partial discharge (corona) degradation inside stator end turns under `480V +/- 1%` operation, eroding slot insulation over `11 months`.
action_taken: Rewound stator coils with corona-resistant inverter-grade magnet wire (`P/N 9939-C`), applied double epoxy VPI dip, and megger tested (`> 1000 Mega-ohms`).
parts_used: Inverter-Grade Magnet Wire Set, Class H Slot Liners, VPI Epoxy Resin

symptom_description: Elevated 1X rotational vibration (`0.53` in/sec RMS) causing structural looseness (`0.013 inch` play) on motor foot shims.
root_cause: Loss of balancing weight (`1.3 lbs` mass detached) from cooling fan or rotor end ring due to vibration fatigue (`0.39` in/sec) over `14233` hours.
action_taken: Disassembled cooling fan shroud, cleaned rotor assembly (`1.4 lbs` dirt cleared), and performed in-situ two-plane dynamic field balancing using trim weights (`Spec-805`).
parts_used: Dynamic Balancing Trim Weight Kit, Fan Shroud Fasteners

symptom_description: Loud gradual whining and chattering sound emanating from motor non-drive end bearing during operation at `51 Hz`.
root_cause: Over-greasing by maintenance personnel caused excessive churning heat (`89`°C) and blown grease retainer seals (`0.14 inch` gap).
action_taken: Replaced drive-end and non-drive-end bearings (`Spec-633`), installed shaft grounding ring (`Spec-759`) to mitigate VFD bearing currents, and realigned unit within `0.013 gap`.
parts_used: DE Ball Bearing, NDE Insulated Bearing, AEGIS Shaft Grounding Ring Kit

symptom_description: Severe high-pitched squealing audible near drive coupling. Motor bearing temperature elevated (`122`°C) with `sharp` radial vibration (`0.49` in/sec RMS).
root_cause: Contamination of bearing grease with ambient chemical dust (`44 ppm` solids) through defective shaft labyrinth seal (`0.013 gap`).
action_taken: Replaced DE/NDE bearings (`P/N 3563-C`), installed upgraded non-contact INPRO labyrinth shaft seals (`P/N 5247-REV2`), and greased with Polyrex EM (`42%` fill).
parts_used: Precision Ball Bearing C3 Set, INPRO Labyrinth Seal Kit, Polyrex EM Grease

symptom_description: Elevated 1X rotational vibration (`0.37` in/sec RMS) causing structural looseness (`0.018 inch` play) on motor foot shims.
root_cause: Improper key length (`0.023 inch` excess key protruding) installed on drive coupling extension during previous coupling replacement.
action_taken: Replaced half-key on coupling shaft extension with precision stepped key (`Spec-845`), re-laser aligned (`0.016 gap`), and verified 1X vibration dropped (`0.62` in/sec).
parts_used: Precision Stepped Shaft Key, Coupling Shim Pack

symptom_description: Radial vibration velocity (`0.55` in/sec RMS) peaking at `1X` running speed (`22 Hz`). Phase angle steady across drive-end bearing pedestal.
root_cause: Improper key length (`0.021 inch` excess key protruding) installed on drive coupling extension during previous coupling replacement.
action_taken: Replaced half-key on coupling shaft extension with precision stepped key (`Spec-358`), re-laser aligned (`0.011 gap`), and verified 1X vibration dropped (`0.31` in/sec).
parts_used: Precision Stepped Shaft Key, Coupling Shim Pack

symptom_description: High leakage current (`0.19 Mega-ohms` insulation resistance) to earth. Stator winding temperature RTD spiked abruptly to `101`°C before trip.
root_cause: Overloading motor beyond `1.15` service factor (`drawing 33%` above rated `35 Amps`) during peak production caused sustained copper heating (`99`°C).
action_taken: Performed complete motor replacement (`P/N 8444-REV2`), renewed lead lugs (`115 ft-lbs` torque), and verified dynamic balance (`0.27` in/sec) and laser alignment (`0.010 gap`).
parts_used: Warehouse Spare Induction Motor Assembly, Mounting Bolt Set, Lead Connectors

symptom_description: Tech noted gradual grease discoloration (`103 ppm` iron debris) leaking from bearing grease relief tube and metallic clattering (`growling`).
root_cause: Shaft voltage discharge (EDM currents of `460V +/- 2%`) from VFD switching transients caused fluting and micro-pitting on bearing raceways.
action_taken: Replaced worn bearing set (`Spec-536`), cleaned grease cavities of `100 ppm` debris, installed new grease relief valves, and balanced rotor assembly (`G2.5`).
parts_used: Bearing Kit (DE & NDE), Lip Seals, Bearing Housing Gasket

symptom_description: Motor drive-end bearing housing temperature reaching `90`°C (`alarm > 85°C`). High frequency acoustic vibration (`0.44` in/sec RMS) detected. Tech observed abnormal acoustic noise propagating across the coupling from CNV-601.
root_cause: Grease dry-out and thermal degradation due to operating in elevated ambient temperature environment (`135`°C housing temp) after `21605` hours.
action_taken: De-coupled motor, removed bearing end shields, replaced both DE and NDE bearings with C3 clearance ball bearings (`P/N 9134-A`), and packed with Polyrex EM (`37%` fill).
parts_used: SKF 6312-C3 Drive-End Bearing, SKF 6310-C3 NDE Bearing, Polyrex EM Grease (1 Tube)

symptom_description: Stator RTD temperature alarm active (`114`°C). Motor drawing `175` Amps (`38%` FLA) with distinct thermal buildup on frame.
root_cause: Broken external cooling fan blade (`37%` fan area lost) caused loss of turbulent airflow across cooling ribs under `213 Amps` load.
action_taken: Replaced damaged polypropylene cooling fan (`Spec-740`), straightened bent fan cowl (`0.017 gap`), and verified full airflow restoration (`97`°C housing).
parts_used: Polypropylene Replacement Cooling Fan, Cowl Hardware Kit
